# Feedback and Community

We are actively looking for feedback from developers building production AI agents, MCP servers, and agentic workflows.

## Feedback

- Found a bug? Open a [GitHub issue](https://github.com/enforra/enforra/issues).
- Have a feature request or integration idea? Open a [GitHub issue](https://github.com/enforra/enforra/issues).
- Trying Enforra with LangGraph, Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, MCP, CrewAI, AutoGen, or another framework? We would like to hear what worked and what was confusing.

## Community

Want to talk directly with the team or explore becoming a design partner? Join our Slack or Discord community.

Slack: https://join.slack.com/t/enforra/shared_invite/zt-3xs2z71z5-9Cf_dqTbYRe3Z1WBiFvRRA

Discord: https://discord.gg/PkXtk9C3q

## Security-sensitive feedback

Security-sensitive feedback should not be posted publicly.

Email: security@enforra.com
